reviews.review_description: The thought that was put into Death By Tomato is very innovative. Simple but still such a fantastic game! The fun never ends and I can play continuously! Catching the cats are something really fun and NEW to insure you gain your health back up! Love each design of the levels. That as well is very different and the catchy beats stimulates adrenaline. Love love love!

developer_response.body: Thank you this is very sweet and means a lot to me!
